mrfox.name: Mr.FOX Live House
mrfox.blurb: Dedicated rock, J-rock and V-kei livehouse in central Bangkok. Home of the annual BangkokBeasts showcase.
mrfox.long: Mr.FOX Live House is the Bangkok venue-of-record for imported J-rock, visual-kei and local heavy indie. Over the last two years it has hosted DEXCORE, SKEGSS, HIZAKI × Kaya, Jupiter and its own recurring flagship — BangkokBeasts. The next edition lands in November 2026.

marshall.name: Marshall Livehouse
marshall.blurb: Mid-size rock room hosting Thai indie tours and regional bills.
marshall.long: Marshall Livehouse is a mid-capacity rock room regularly hosting Thai indie tours and regional bills. Bitter Sweet plays there on 9 May 2026.

princemahidol.name: Prince Mahidol Hall
princemahidol.blurb: Mahidol University's formal concert hall. Orchestral and recital programming.
princemahidol.long: Prince Mahidol Hall is Mahidol University's formal 2,000-seat concert hall in Salaya. It hosts classical recitals, touring orchestras and live-to-picture film scores. Upcoming: How To Train Your Dragon In Concert (16 May 2026) and Ray Chen's violin recital (7 Jun 2026).

tcc.name: Thailand Cultural Centre
tcc.blurb: The state's primary hall for symphonic, film score and touring productions.
tcc.long: The Thailand Cultural Centre (TCC) is the state hall of record for symphonic music, live-to-picture shows and large-scale touring productions. Upcoming: Music of Square Enix (18 Jul 2026).

lido.name: Lido Connect
lido.blurb: Repurposed art-house cinema. Indie pop, singer-songwriter, one-off tours.
lido.long: Lido Connect is a repurposed art-house cinema in Siam Square converted into a tiered live stage. It programs indie pop, singer-songwriter sets and one-off touring shows across three screens.

impact.name: Impact Arena
impact.blurb: Thailand's arena of record. International tours and stadium pop.
impact.long: Impact Arena is Thailand's arena of record — the standard venue for international stadium tours, major Thai pop tours, and K-pop dates. Located in Muang Thong Thani, Nonthaburi.

worldsiam.name: World Siam Stadium
worldsiam.blurb: Combat sports and concerts under one roof. Mixed programming.
worldsiam.long: World Siam Stadium is a mixed-use Bangkok venue hosting Muay Thai, combat sports events and periodic live concerts.
